title: Santa and Mrs. Claus use military transports to bring Christmas to a Tlingit village
summary: Mark Thiessen Associated Press YAKUTAT, Alaska — Forget the open-air sleigh overloaded with gifts and powered by flying reindeer. Santa and Mrs. Claus this week took supersized rides to southeast Alaska in a C-17 military cargo plane and a camouflaged Humvee, as they delivered toys to the Tlingit village of Yakutat, northwest of Juneau. The visit was part of this year’s Op...

title: City Hall will close early on December 24th at 2 pm and will be closed December 25th
summary: Happy Holidays from City Hall! City Hall will close early on Christmas Eve, December 24, at 2 PM, and will be closed on Christmas Day, December 25. The post City Hall will close early on December 24th at 2 pm and will be closed December 25th appeared first on City of Cordova, Alaska .

title: BSNC Board Approves Open Enrollment Resolution for 2025 Shareholder Proxy
summary: The Board of Directors has unanimously approved placing open enrollment for BSNC descendants on the 2025 shareholder proxy. If approved by shareholders, opening the rolls would allow descendants of BSNC shareholders, who meet specific eligibility criteria, the opportunity to become shareholders. Thi...
